---
title: Importing tokens
description: Import design tokens from Figma or other design systems into Subframe.
---

Import design tokens from existing design systems to match your brand. Subframe supports CSS variable import for quick token migration.

## Importing CSS variables

The fastest way to import tokens is via CSS variables:

1. Copy CSS variables from your design system (Figma variables export, storybook, or existing codebase)
2. Navigate to **Components > Theme** in Subframe
3. Click **Import CSS variables**
4. Paste your CSS variables
5. Review the imported tokens
6. Click **Import** to apply

### Supported CSS variable format

Subframe accepts standard CSS custom properties:

```css
:root {
  --color-brand-primary: #3B82F6;
  --color-background: #FFFFFF;
  --font-family-sans: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  --spacing-4: 16px;
  --border-radius-md: 8px;
}
```

Token names convert to Subframe's naming convention automatically. For example, `--color-brand-primary` becomes `brand-primary` in your color tokens.

## Importing from Figma

Export Figma variables as CSS using Figma plugins or manual export:

1. In Figma, use a plugin to export variables as CSS (e.g., "Figma Tokens")
2. Copy the generated CSS variables
3. Use the CSS variable import feature in Subframe
4. Adjust any token mappings as needed

<Note>
Figma variable export requires a plugin. Look for "CSS Variables Export" or "Design Tokens" plugins in the Figma community.
</Note>

## After importing

**Review imported tokens** - Check that colors, fonts, and spacing match your expectations. Some conversions may need manual adjustment.

**Test across components** - Browse your component library to verify imported tokens work correctly with base components.

**Sync to code** - Run `npx @subframe/cli sync --all` to update your codebase with imported theme tokens.

## Best practices

**Clean up token names** - After import, rename tokens to match Subframe conventions if needed.

**Reference relationships** - Ensure semantic tokens (like `color-error`) reference base tokens correctly.

**Document sources** - Note where tokens came from for future reference when syncing updates.

## Troubleshooting

<AccordionGroup>
<Accordion title="Import fails with format error">

Verify your CSS variables use standard syntax:
- Must start with `--`
- Use valid CSS values (hex colors, px/rem units, font names)
- No JavaScript or preprocessor syntax

</Accordion>
<Accordion title="Tokens don't map correctly">

Some token names may not auto-map to Subframe categories:
- Manually reassign tokens in the theme editor
- Use semantic naming for better auto-detection
- Check that color values are hex codes or rgb/hsl

</Accordion>
<Accordion title="Fonts don't load">

For custom fonts:
- Ensure font files are accessible
- Add font imports to your project
- Google Fonts work automatically when specified by name

</Accordion>
</AccordionGroup>
